race.comment: UNDER ARREST (7) resumes here but the form he showed in his first preparation was good enough for a race of this calibre. Tuned up for this with a recent trial and a strong showing while fresh would not surprise. WOODROW (8) brings NSW formlines to the table and should find this assignment a touch easier than what he faced down south. Looms as the main danger. RECONCILIATE (11) placed around this circuit last time out and again gets the reliable Gollan/Jones combination. Top-three aspirations. SAINT ALDWYN (5) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome at the latest effort but go on the solid second at Canterbury when resuming. Can bounce right back. BOMB PERIGNON (10) best of the rest from the favourable draw.
